---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability, integration, or API improvement.
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

What capability is missing, and what user problem does it solve?

## Proposed API or workflow

Describe the desired user-facing shape.

## Why this belongs in redress

Explain why this should be part of the project rather than application-specific glue.

## Proposed approach

Keep this high level and implementation-oriented.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Clear user-facing behavior
- [ ] Test coverage for the new behavior
- [ ] Docs or examples updated if needed

## Notes / references

Related issues, roadmap notes, comparable prior art, or file paths.
